note: Run /eval to populate pass_rate before promoting to regression suite

evals.prompt: Crie um portfolio online para um escritorio de arquitetura premium. Estilo minimalista com muito whitespace.
evals.expected_output: Portfolio with design tokens, semantic HTML, Tailwind styling, GSAP animations, following 6-phase pipeline
expectations: Asks about or confirms the design vibe/style before writing code
Generates CSS custom properties or Tailwind config with design tokens BEFORE writing HTML
Uses multiples of 8px for spacing (padding, margin, gap values)
Includes GSAP ScrollTrigger for scroll-based reveal animations
Has responsive styles for at least 3 breakpoints (mobile, tablet, desktop)
Uses semantic HTML elements (header, main, section, footer) with aria-labels or alt texts
Follows the 6-phase pipeline order: curadoria, tokens, HTML structure, styling, animations, validation

evals.prompt: Crie uma landing page para um SaaS de analytics com design neon/cyberpunk e animacoes impressionantes.
evals.expected_output: Landing page with neon design tokens, dark bg, glow effects, GSAP animations, Canvas/Three.js background
expectations: Design tokens include neon/vibrant colors with dark background palette
Uses text-shadow with spread or box-shadow glow effects for neon aesthetic
Includes Canvas API or Three.js for animated premium background (particles, gradients)
Uses GSAP ScrollTrigger for scroll-based reveal animations
Built mobile-first with responsive breakpoints
Design tokens generated before HTML structure
Follows the 6-phase pipeline order

evals.prompt: Crie uma pagina de produto para um relogio de luxo. Estilo editorial premium com glassmorphism sutil.
evals.expected_output: Product page with glassmorphism tokens, serif typography, product gallery, WCAG AA compliance
expectations: Design tokens include glassmorphism properties (backdrop-filter, glass-bg, glass-border)
Uses backdrop-filter: blur() with rgba transparent backgrounds
Uses serif or display font for headings/titles
Product gallery section with hover state interactions
Consistent 8px-based spacing system throughout
Addresses WCAG AA requirements (contrast, focus states, alt text)
Follows the 6-phase pipeline order

evals.prompt: Crie um blog minimalista editorial com foco em tipografia e whitespace generoso.
evals.expected_output: Blog with typography-focused design, asymmetric grid, generous whitespace, reduced-motion support
expectations: Typography is the main visual element with large/varied font sizes and weights
Uses asymmetric or editorial grid layout
Generous whitespace with large padding/margin values
Serif font for headings or titles
Design tokens defined before HTML structure
Respects prefers-reduced-motion media query
Follows the 6-phase pipeline order

evals.prompt: Crie um dashboard de analytics com design glassmorphism em dark mode. Cards translucidos com graficos.
evals.expected_output: Dashboard with dark glassmorphism theme, translucent cards, CSS Grid layout, GSAP animations
expectations: Dark theme with glassmorphism effect applied to cards
Cards use backdrop-filter: blur() with translucent rgba backgrounds
Design tokens configured for dark theme
Uses CSS Grid for responsive dashboard layout
Cards have hover micro-interactions (scale, shadow, glow transitions)
GSAP used for data or transition animations
Follows the 6-phase pipeline order
